instruction: Compute {a} mod {n}. Then state what this tells you: if an event repeats every {n} steps and you are at step {a}, which step position are you in?
steps: {a} divided by {n} gives quotient {quotient} with remainder {remainder}.
{a} mod {n} = {answer_modarith160}. You are at position {answer_modarith160} in the cycle.
